# Step 01: Explore Legacy Java 8 Application
# Generated by GH Copilot CLI - Spec2Cloud Methodology

## Codebase Analysis

### Project Structure
- **Parent POM**: Multi-module Maven project (Java 8, Spring Boot 2.7.18)
- **Web Module**: Spring MVC app with Thymeleaf, handles uploads/browsing
- **Worker Module**: Async thumbnail generator via RabbitMQ

### Technology Stack
- Java 8 (OpenJDK Temurin 1.8.0_482)
- Spring Boot 2.7.18
- AWS SDK v2 (2.25.13) for S3
- RabbitMQ (AMQP) for messaging
- PostgreSQL + Hibernate JPA
- Lombok for boilerplate reduction
- Thymeleaf + Bootstrap 5 frontend

### Module Breakdown

#### Web Module (15 Java files)
- AssetsManagerApplication.java - Main entry point (@SpringBootApplication, @EnableRabbit)
- AwsS3Config.java - AWS S3 client configuration
- RabbitConfig.java - RabbitMQ queue/converter/listener factory
- WebMvcConfig.java - MVC config extending deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter
- StorageConstants.java - Static constants
- HomeController.java - Root redirect to /storage
- S3Controller.java - Storage CRUD endpoints (list, upload, view, delete)
- ImageMetadata.java - JPA entity with @PrePersist/@PreUpdate
- ImageProcessingMessage.java - RabbitMQ message DTO
- S3StorageItem.java - Storage object DTO
- ImageMetadataRepository.java - Spring Data JPA repository
- AwsS3Service.java - S3 storage implementation (Profile: !dev)
- LocalFileStorageService.java - Local storage (Profile: dev)
- BackupMessageProcessor.java - Message monitor (Profile: backup)
- StorageService.java - Storage abstraction interface

#### Worker Module (12 Java files)
- WorkerApplication.java - Entry point (@EnableScheduling, @EnableRabbit)
- AwsS3Config.java - S3 config (note: uses aws.accessKeyId vs web's aws.accessKey)
- RabbitConfig.java - Identical to web
- ImageMetadata.java - JPA entity (duplicate of web)
- ImageProcessingMessage.java - Message DTO (duplicate of web)
- ImageMetadataRepository.java - JPA repository (duplicate of web)
- AbstractFileProcessingService.java - Template method for image processing
- FileProcessor.java - Processing interface
- S3FileProcessingService.java - S3 processing (Profile: !dev)
- LocalFileProcessingService.java - Local processing (Profile: dev)
- StorageUtil.java - Utility for thumbnail key generation

### Key Patterns
1. **Strategy Pattern**: StorageService interface with S3/Local implementations
2. **Template Method**: AbstractFileProcessingService for thumbnail pipeline
3. **Profile-based Configuration**: dev/!dev/backup profiles
4. **Message-Driven Architecture**: RabbitMQ with manual acknowledgment

### Legacy Java 8 Patterns Found
- WebMvcConfigurerAdapter (deprecated)
- HandlerInterceptorAdapter (deprecated)
- Anonymous inner classes where lambdas could be used
- Verbose type declarations (no var)
- Traditional getter/setter classes (could be records)
- String concatenation (could use text blocks)
- Manual null checks (no pattern matching)
- No sealed classes for type hierarchies

### Build Result
- Maven compile: SUCCESS (Java 8, Spring Boot 2.7.18)
- All modules compiled without errors
